**User Request:** [Image: source: /Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/.claude/image-cache/ed3c7f23-6085-4f41-8e1b-d3b5c82da99c/1.png]

**Tool:** Edit
**Input:** ```json
{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/Agentic/_work/rapid-automations/integrations/operational-knowledge-<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>sal.ts",
  "old_string": "export function getDirectNeighborKeys(\n  entityKey: string,\n  entities: ViewerEntity[],\n  edges: ViewerEdge[],\n): string[] {\n  const entitySet = new Set(entities.map((e) => e.key));\n  const neighbors = new Set<string>();\n  for (const edge of edges) {\n    if (edge.source === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.target);\n    } else if (edge.target === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.source);\n    }\n  }\n  return [...neighbors];\n}",
  "new_string": "export function getDirectNeighborKeys(\n  entityKey: string,\n  entities: ViewerEntity[],\n  edges: ViewerEdge[],\n): string[] {\n  const entitySet = new Set(entities.map((e) => e.key));\n  const neighbors = new Set<string>();\n  for (const edge of edges) {\n    if (edge.type === 'CORRELATED_WITH') continue;\n    if (edge.source === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.target);\n    } else if (edge.target === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.source);\n    }\n  }\n  return [...neighbors];\n}"
}
```

{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/Agentic/_work/rapid-automations/integrations/operational-knowledge-management/src/api/routes.ts",
  "old_string": "    } else {\n      // Find most recent matching directory\n      const rcaBaseDir = path.join(this.dataDir, 'rca');\n      if (!fs.existsSync(rcaBaseDir)) {\n        sendError(res, 'No RCA data directory found', 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      const dirs = fs.readdirSync(rcaBaseDir, { withFileTypes: true })\n        .filter(d => d.isDirectory() && (pipelineName === 'e2e' ? d.name.includes('e2e') || d.name.includes('rpr') : d.name.includes(pipelineName)))\n        .sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));\n      if (dirs.length === 0) {\n        sendError(res, `No ${pipelineName} RCA directories found`, 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      rcaDir = path.join(rcaBaseDir, dirs[0].name);\n    }",
  "new_string": "    } else {\n      // Find most recent matching directory across all RCA base dirs\n      const rcaBaseDirs = this.getRcaBaseDirs();\n      if (rcaBaseDirs.length === 0) {\n        sendError(res, 'No RCA data directory found', 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      const allDirs: Array<{ name: string; fullPath: string }> = [];\n      for (const base of rcaBaseDirs) {\n        for (const d of fs.readdirSync(base, { withFileTypes: true })) {\n          if (!d.isDirectory()) continue;\n          const matchesPipeline = pipelineName === 'e2e'\n            ? d.name.includes('e2e') || d.name.includes('rpr')\n            : d.name.includes(pipelineName);\n          if (matchesPipeline) {\n            allDirs.push({ name: d.name, fullPath: path.join(base, d.name) });\n          }\n        }\n      }\n      allDirs.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));\n      if (allDirs.length === 0) {\n        sendError(res, `No ${pipelineName} RCA directories found`, 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      rcaDir = allDirs[0].fullPath;\n    }"
}

}

  "new_string": "  for (const edge of edges) {\n    // Skip correlation edges — they are statistical co-occurrence, not meaningful\n    // navigational relationships.  Including them inflates the tour from ~14 to 180+.\n    if (edge.type === 'CORRELATED_WITH') continue;\n\n    let neighborKey: string | null = null;\n    if (edge.source === startKey && entityMap.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighborKey = edge.target;\n    } else if (edge.target === startKey && entityMap.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighborKey = edge.source;\n    }\n    if (!neighborKey) continue;\n\n    const prio = edgePriority(edge.type, isDocMode);\n    const existing = neighborBest.get(neighborKey);\n    if (!existing || prio < existing.priority) {\n      neighborBest.set(neighborKey, { priority: prio, edgeType: edge.type });\n    }\n  }"
}

**User Request:** [Image: source: /Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/.claude/image-cache/ed3c7f23-6085-4f41-8e1b-d3b5c82da99c/1.png]

**Tool:** Edit
**Input:** ```json
{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/Agentic/_work/rapid-automations/integrations/operational-knowledge-<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>sal.ts",
  "old_string": "export function getDirectNeighborKeys(\n  entityKey: string,\n  entities: ViewerEntity[],\n  edges: ViewerEdge[],\n): string[] {\n  const entitySet = new Set(entities.map((e) => e.key));\n  const neighbors = new Set<string>();\n  for (const edge of edges) {\n    if (edge.source === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.target);\n    } else if (edge.target === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.source);\n    }\n  }\n  return [...neighbors];\n}",
  "new_string": "export function getDirectNeighborKeys(\n  entityKey: string,\n  entities: ViewerEntity[],\n  edges: ViewerEdge[],\n): string[] {\n  const entitySet = new Set(entities.map((e) => e.key));\n  const neighbors = new Set<string>();\n  for (const edge of edges) {\n    if (edge.type === 'CORRELATED_WITH') continue;\n    if (edge.source === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.target);\n    } else if (edge.target === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.source);\n    }\n  }\n  return [...neighbors];\n}"
}
```

'kpifw' : d.name.includes('raas') ? 'raas' : (hasRaas ? 'raas' : hasKpifw ? 'kpifw' : 'unknown');\n          const findingCount = raasFiles.length + kpifwFiles.length;\n          if (findingCount > 0) {\n            entries.push({ name: d.name, path: fullPath, pipeline, findingCount, timestamp });\n          }\n        }\n      }\n      entries.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));\n      sendSuccess(res, { dirs: entries });",
  "new_string": "      for (const rcaBaseDir of rcaBaseDirs) {\n        for (const d of fs.readdirSync(rcaBaseDir, { withFileTypes: true }).filter(d => d.isDirectory())) {\n          const fullPath = path.join(rcaBaseDir, d.name);\n          const raasFiles = fs.readdirSync(fullPath).filter(f => f.match(/^raas-rca-cluster-\\d+\\.json$/));\n          const kpifwFiles = fs.readdirSync(fullPath).filter(f => f.match(/^kpifw-rca-group-\\d+\\.json$/));\n          const timestamp = d.name.split('_')[0] || '';\n          const hasRaas = raasFiles.length > 0;\n          const hasKpifw = kpifwFiles.length > 0;\n\n          if (hasRaas && hasKpifw) {\n            entries.push({ name: d.name, path: fullPath, pipeline: 'raas', findingCount: raasFiles.length, timestamp });\n            entries.push({ name: d.name, path: fullPath, pipeline: 'kpifw', findingCount: kpifwFiles.length, timestamp });\n          } else {\n            const pipeline = d.name.includes('kpifw') ? **Input:** ```json
{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/Agentic/_work/rapid-automations/integrations/operational-knowledge-management/src/api/routes.ts",
  "old_string": "    } else {\n      // Find most recent matching directory\n      const rcaBaseDir = path.join(this.dataDir, 'rca');\n      if (!fs.existsSync(rcaBaseDir)) {\n        sendError(res, 'No RCA data directory found', 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      const dirs = fs.readdirSync(rcaBaseDir, { withFileTypes: true })\n        .filter(d => d.isDirectory() && (pipelineName === 'e2e' ? d.name.includes('e2e') || d.name.includes('rpr') : d.name.includes(pipelineName)))\n        .sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));\n      if (dirs.length === 0) {\n        sendError(res, `No ${pipelineName} RCA directories found`, 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      rcaDir = path.join(rcaBaseDir, dirs[0].name);\n    }",
  "new_string": "    } else {\n      // Find most recent matching directory across all RCA base dirs\n      const rcaBaseDirs = this.getRcaBaseDirs();\n      if (rcaBaseDirs.length === 0) {\n        sendError(res, 'No RCA data directory found', 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      const allDirs: Array<{ name: string; fullPath: string }> = [];\n      for (const base of rcaBaseDirs) {\n        for (const d of fs.readdirSync(base, { withFileTypes: true })) {\n          if (!d.isDirectory()) continue;\n          const matchesPipeline = pipelineName === 'e2e'\n            ? d.name.includes('e2e') || d.name.includes('rpr')\n            : d.name.includes(pipelineName);\n          if (matchesPipeline) {\n            allDirs.push({ name: d.name, fullPath: path.join(base, d.name) });\n          }\n        }\n      }\n      allDirs.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));\n      if (allDirs.length === 0) {\n        sendError(res, `No ${pipelineName} RCA directories found`, 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      rcaDir = allDirs[0].fullPath;\n    }"
}

{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/Agentic/_work/rapid-automations/integrations/operational-knowledge-<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>sal.ts",
  "old_string": "  for (const edge of edges) {\n    let neighborKey: string | null = null;\n    if (edge.source === startKey && entityMap.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighborKey = edge.target;\n    } else if (edge.target === startKey && entityMap.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighborKey = edge.source;\n    }\n    if (!neighborKey) continue;\n\n    const prio = edgePriority(edge.type, isDocMode);\n    const existing = neighborBest.get(neighborKey);\n    if (!existing || prio < existing.priority) {\n      neighborBest.set(neighborKey, { priority: prio, edgeType: edge.type });\n    }\n  }",
  "new_string": "  for (const edge of edges) {\n    // Skip correlation edges — they are statistical co-occurrence, not meaningful\n    // navigational relationships.  Including them inflates the tour from ~14 to 180+.\n    if (edge.type === 'CORRELATED_WITH') continue;\n\n    let neighborKey: string | null = null;\n    if (edge.source === startKey && entityMap.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighborKey = edge.target;\n    } else if (edge.target === startKey && entityMap.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighborKey = edge.source;\n    }\n    if (!neighborKey) continue;\n\n    const prio = edgePriority(edge.type, isDocMode);\n    const existing = neighborBest.get(neighborKey);\n    if (!existing || prio < existing.priority) {\n      neighborBest.set(neighborKey, { priority: prio, edgeType: edge.type });\n    }\n  }"
}
```

### Edit - 2026-04-08 18:46:18 UTC [20:46:18 CEST] (Redirected)

**User Request:** [Image: source: /Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/.claude/image-cache/ed3c7f23-6085-4f41-8e1b-d3b5c82da99c/1.png]

**Tool:** Edit
**Input:** ```json
{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/Agentic/_work/rapid-automations/integrations/operational-knowledge-<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>sal.ts",
  "old_string": "export function getDirectNeighborKeys(\n  entityKey: string,\n  entities: ViewerEntity[],\n  edges: ViewerEdge[],\n): string[] {\n  const entitySet = new Set(entities.map((e) => e.key));\n  const neighbors = new Set<string>();\n  for (const edge of edges) {\n    if (edge.source === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.target);\n    } else if (edge.target === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.source);\n    }\n  }\n  return [...neighbors];\n}",
  "new_string": "export function getDirectNeighborKeys(\n  entityKey: string,\n  entities: ViewerEntity[],\n  edges: ViewerEdge[],\n): string[] {\n  const entitySet = new Set(entities.map((e) => e.key));\n  const neighbors = new Set<string>();\n  for (const edge of edges) {\n    if (edge.type === 'CORRELATED_WITH') continue;\n    if (edge.source === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.target);\n    } else if (edge.target === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.source);\n    }\n  }\n  return [...neighbors];\n}"
}
```

'kpifw' : d.name.includes('raas') ? 'raas' : (hasRaas ? 'raas' : hasKpifw ? 'kpifw' : 'unknown');\n          const findingCount = raasFiles.length + kpifwFiles.length;\n          if (findingCount > 0) {\n            entries.push({ name: d.name, path: fullPath, pipeline, findingCount, timestamp });\n          }\n        }\n      }\n      entries.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));\n      sendSuccess(res, { dirs: entries });",
  "new_string": "      for (const rcaBaseDir of rcaBaseDirs) {\n        for (const d of fs.readdirSync(rcaBaseDir, { withFileTypes: true }).filter(d => d.isDirectory())) {\n          const fullPath = path.join(rcaBaseDir, d.name);\n          const raasFiles = fs.readdirSync(fullPath).filter(f => f.match(/^raas-rca-cluster-\\d+\\.json$/));\n          const kpifwFiles = fs.readdirSync(fullPath).filter(f => f.match(/^kpifw-rca-group-\\d+\\.json$/));\n          const timestamp = d.name.split('_')[0] || '';\n          const hasRaas = raasFiles.length > 0;\n          const hasKpifw = kpifwFiles.length > 0;\n\n          if (hasRaas && hasKpifw) {\n            entries.push({ name: d.name, path: fullPath, pipeline: 'raas', findingCount: raasFiles.length, timestamp });\n            entries.push({ name: d.name, path: fullPath, pipeline: 'kpifw', findingCount: kpifwFiles.length, timestamp });\n          } else {\n            const pipeline = d.name.includes('kpifw') ? 'kpifw' : d.name.includes('raas') ? 'raas' : (hasRaas ? 'raas' : hasKpifw ? 'kpifw' : 'unknown');\n            const findingCount = raasFiles.length + kpifwFiles.length;\n            if (findingCount > 0) {\n              entries.push({ name: d.name, path: fullPath, pipeline, findingCount, timestamp });\n            }\n          }\n        }\n      }\n      entries.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));\n      sendSuccess(res, { dirs: entries });"
}

{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/Agentic/_work/rapid-automations/integrations/operational-knowledge-management/src/api/routes.ts",
  "old_string": "    } else {\n      // Find most recent matching directory\n      const rcaBaseDir = path.join(this.dataDir, 'rca');\n      if (!fs.existsSync(rcaBaseDir)) {\n        sendError(res, 'No RCA data directory found', 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      const dirs = fs.readdirSync(rcaBaseDir, { withFileTypes: true })\n        .filter(d => d.isDirectory() && (pipelineName === 'e2e' ? d.name.includes('e2e') || d.name.includes('rpr') : d.name.includes(pipelineName)))\n        .sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));\n      if (dirs.length === 0) {\n        sendError(res, `No ${pipelineName} RCA directories found`, 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      rcaDir = path.join(rcaBaseDir, dirs[0].name);\n    }",
  "new_string": "    } else {\n      // Find most recent matching directory across all RCA base dirs\n      const rcaBaseDirs = this.getRcaBaseDirs();\n      if (rcaBaseDirs.length === 0) {\n        sendError(res, 'No RCA data directory found', 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      const allDirs: Array<{ name: string; fullPath: string }> = [];\n      for (const base of rcaBaseDirs) {\n        for (const d of fs.readdirSync(base, { withFileTypes: true })) {\n          if (!d.isDirectory()) continue;\n          const matchesPipeline = pipelineName === 'e2e'\n            ? d.name.includes('e2e') || d.name.includes('rpr')\n            : d.name.includes(pipelineName);\n          if (matchesPipeline) {\n            allDirs.push({ name: d.name, fullPath: path.join(base, d.name) });\n          }\n        }\n      }\n      allDirs.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));\n      if (allDirs.length === 0) {\n        sendError(res, `No ${pipelineName} RCA directories found`, 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      rcaDir = allDirs[0].fullPath;\n    }"
}
```

}

{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/Agentic/_work/rapid-automations/integrations/operational-knowledge-<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>sal.ts",
  "old_string": "  for (const edge of edges) {\n    let neighborKey: string | null = null;\n    if (edge.source === startKey && entityMap.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighborKey = edge.target;\n    } else if (edge.target === startKey && entityMap.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighborKey = edge.source;\n    }\n    if (!neighborKey) continue;\n\n    const prio = edgePriority(edge.type, isDocMode);\n    const existing = neighborBest.get(neighborKey);\n    if (!existing || prio < existing.priority) {\n      neighborBest.set(neighborKey, { priority: prio, edgeType: edge.type });\n    }\n  }",
  "new_string": "  for (const edge of edges) {\n    // Skip correlation edges — they are statistical co-occurrence, not meaningful\n    // navigational relationships.  Including them inflates the tour from ~14 to 180+.\n    if (edge.type === 'CORRELATED_WITH') continue;\n\n    let neighborKey: string | null = null;\n    if (edge.source === startKey && entityMap.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighborKey = edge.target;\n    } else if (edge.target === startKey && entityMap.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighborKey = edge.source;\n    }\n    if (!neighborKey) continue;\n\n    const prio = edgePriority(edge.type, isDocMode);\n    const existing = neighborBest.get(neighborKey);\n    if (!existing || prio < existing.priority) {\n      neighborBest.set(neighborKey, { priority: prio, edgeType: edge.type });\n    }\n  }"
}
```

**User Request:** [Image: source: /Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/.claude/image-cache/ed3c7f23-6085-4f41-8e1b-d3b5c82da99c/1.png]

**Tool:** Edit
**Input:** ```json
{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/Agentic/_work/rapid-automations/integrations/operational-knowledge-<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>sal.ts",
  "old_string": "export function getDirectNeighborKeys(\n  entityKey: string,\n  entities: ViewerEntity[],\n  edges: ViewerEdge[],\n): string[] {\n  const entitySet = new Set(entities.map((e) => e.key));\n  const neighbors = new Set<string>();\n  for (const edge of edges) {\n    if (edge.source === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.target);\n    } else if (edge.target === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.source);\n    }\n  }\n  return [...neighbors];\n}",
  "new_string": "export function getDirectNeighborKeys(\n  entityKey: string,\n  entities: ViewerEntity[],\n  edges: ViewerEdge[],\n): string[] {\n  const entitySet = new Set(entities.map((e) => e.key));\n  const neighbors = new Set<string>();\n  for (const edge of edges) {\n    if (edge.type === 'CORRELATED_WITH') continue;\n    if (edge.source === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.target);\n    } else if (edge.target === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.source);\n    }\n  }\n  return [...neighbors];\n}"
}
```

'kpifw' : d.name.includes('raas') ? 'raas' : (hasRaas ? 'raas' : hasKpifw ? 'kpifw' : 'unknown');\n          const findingCount = raasFiles.length + kpifwFiles.length;\n          if (findingCount > 0) {\n            entries.push({ name: d.name, path: fullPath, pipeline, findingCount, timestamp });\n          }\n        }\n      }\n      entries.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));\n      sendSuccess(res, { dirs: entries });",
  "new_string": "      for (const rcaBaseDir of rcaBaseDirs) {\n        for (const d of fs.readdirSync(rcaBaseDir, { withFileTypes: true }).filter(d => d.isDirectory())) {\n          const fullPath = path.join(rcaBaseDir, d.name);\n          const raasFiles = fs.readdirSync(fullPath).filter(f => f.match(/^raas-rca-cluster-\\d+\\.json$/));\n          const kpifwFiles = fs.readdirSync(fullPath).filter(f => f.match(/^kpifw-rca-group-\\d+\\.json$/));\n          const timestamp = d.name.split('_')[0] || '';\n          const hasRaas = raasFiles.length > 0;\n          const hasKpifw = kpifwFiles.length > 0;\n\n          if (hasRaas && hasKpifw) {\n            entries.push({ name: d.name, path: fullPath, pipeline: 'raas', findingCount: raasFiles.length, timestamp });\n            entries.push({ name: d.name, path: fullPath, pipeline: 'kpifw', findingCount: kpifwFiles.length, timestamp });\n          } else {\n            const pipeline = d.name.includes('kpifw') ? {
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/Agentic/_work/rapid-automations/integrations/operational-knowledge-management/src/api/routes.ts",
  "old_string": "    } else {\n      // Find most recent matching directory\n      const rcaBaseDir = path.join(this.dataDir, 'rca');\n      if (!fs.existsSync(rcaBaseDir)) {\n        sendError(res, 'No RCA data directory found', 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      const dirs = fs.readdirSync(rcaBaseDir, { withFileTypes: true })\n        .filter(d => d.isDirectory() && (pipelineName === 'e2e' ? d.name.includes('e2e') || d.name.includes('rpr') : d.name.includes(pipelineName)))\n        .sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));\n      if (dirs.length === 0) {\n        sendError(res, `No ${pipelineName} RCA directories found`, 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      rcaDir = path.join(rcaBaseDir, dirs[0].name);\n    }",
  "new_string": "    } else {\n      // Find most recent matching directory across all RCA base dirs\n      const rcaBaseDirs = this.getRcaBaseDirs();\n      if (rcaBaseDirs.length === 0) {\n        sendError(res, 'No RCA data directory found', 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      const allDirs: Array<{ name: string; fullPath: string }> = [];\n      for (const base of rcaBaseDirs) {\n        for (const d of fs.readdirSync(base, { withFileTypes: true })) {\n          if (!d.isDirectory()) continue;\n          const matchesPipeline = pipelineName === 'e2e'\n            ? d.name.includes('e2e') || d.name.includes('rpr')\n            : d.name.includes(pipelineName);\n          if (matchesPipeline) {\n            allDirs.push({ name: d.name, fullPath: path.join(base, d.name) });\n          }\n        }\n      }\n      allDirs.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));\n      if (allDirs.length === 0) {\n        sendError(res, `No ${pipelineName} RCA directories found`, 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      rcaDir = allDirs[0].fullPath;\n    }"
}

  "new_string": "  const dirIdx = args.indexOf('--dir');\n  let findingDir: string;\n  if (dirIdx !== -1 && args[dirIdx + 1]) {\n    findingDir = args[dirIdx + 1];\n  } else {\n    // Auto-discover: find most recent RCA run in rapid-toolkit\n    const toolkitRca = path.resolve(__dirname, '..', '..', 'rapid-toolkit', '.data', 'rca');\n    if (fs.existsSync(toolkitRca)) {\n      const subdirs = fs.readdirSync(toolkitRca, { withFileTypes: true })\n        .filter(d => d.isDirectory())\n        .sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));\n      if (subdirs.length > 0) {\n        findingDir = path.join(toolkitRca, subdirs[0].name);\n        process.stderr.write(`Auto-discovered RCA dir: ${findingDir}\\n`);\n      } else {\n        console.error('No RCA run directories found in rapid-toolkit');\n        process.exit(1);\n      }\n    } else {\n      console.error(`RCA data not found at ${toolkitRca}. Use --dir to specify.`);\n      process.exit(1);\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Discover finding files\n  const raasFiles = fs.readdirSync(findingDir)"
}

**Tool:** Bash
**Input:** ```json
{
  "command": "python3 -c \"\nimport json\n# Check all sourceRef types across all domains\nfor domain_file in ['.data/exports/raas.json', '.data/exports/kpi-fw.json', '.data/exports/general.json']:\n    try:\n        with open(domain_file) as f:\n            data = json.load(f)\n    except: continue\n    type_counts = {}\n    total_refs = 0\n    for node in data.get('nodes', []):\n        refs = node.get('attributes', {}).get('metadata', {}).get('sourceRefs', [])\n        total_refs += len(refs)\n        for ref in refs:\n            t = ref.get('type', '?')\n            type_counts[t] = type_counts.get(t, 0) + 1\n    print(f'{domain_file}: {total_refs} total refs, types: {type_counts}')\n\"\n",
  "description": "Check sourceRef type distribution across all domains"

{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/Agentic/_work/rapid-automations/integrations/operational-knowledge-<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>sal.ts",
  "old_string": "  for (const edge of edges) {\n    let neighborKey: string | null = null;\n    if (edge.source === startKey && entityMap.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighborKey = edge.target;\n    } else if (edge.target === startKey && entityMap.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighborKey = edge.source;\n    }\n    if (!neighborKey) continue;\n\n    const prio = edgePriority(edge.type, isDocMode);\n    const existing = neighborBest.get(neighborKey);\n    if (!existing || prio < existing.priority) {\n      neighborBest.set(neighborKey, { priority: prio, edgeType: edge.type });\n    }\n  }",
  "new_string": "  for (const edge of edges) {\n    // Skip correlation edges — they are statistical co-occurrence, not meaningful\n    // navigational relationships.  Including them inflates the tour from ~14 to 180+.\n    if (edge.type === 'CORRELATED_WITH') continue;\n\n    let neighborKey: string | null = null;\n    if (edge.source === startKey && entityMap.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighborKey = edge.target;\n    } else if (edge.target === startKey && entityMap.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighborKey = edge.source;\n    }\n    if (!neighborKey) continue;\n\n    const prio = edgePriority(edge.type, isDocMode);\n    const existing = neighborBest.get(neighborKey);\n    if (!existing || prio < existing.priority) {\n      neighborBest.set(neighborKey, { priority: prio, edgeType: edge.type });\n    }\n  }"
}
```

**Tool:** Edit
**Input:** ```json
{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/Agentic/_work/rapid-automations/integrations/operational-knowledge-<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>sal.ts",
  "old_string": "export function getDirectNeighborKeys(\n  entityKey: string,\n  entities: ViewerEntity[],\n  edges: ViewerEdge[],\n): string[] {\n  const entitySet = new Set(entities.map((e) => e.key));\n  const neighbors = new Set<string>();\n  for (const edge of edges) {\n    if (edge.source === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.target);\n    } else if (edge.target === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.source);\n    }\n  }\n  return [...neighbors];\n}",
  "new_string": "export function getDirectNeighborKeys(\n  entityKey: string,\n  entities: ViewerEntity[],\n  edges: ViewerEdge[],\n): string[] {\n  const entitySet = new Set(entities.map((e) => e.key));\n  const neighbors = new Set<string>();\n  for (const edge of edges) {\n    if (edge.type === 'CORRELATED_WITH') continue;\n    if (edge.source === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.target);\n    } else if (edge.target === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.source);\n    }\n  }\n  return [...neighbors];\n}"
}

  "new_string": "  /**\n   * Resolve all directories that may contain RCA findings.\n   * Primary: <dataDir>/rca/  (OKB's own data directory)\n   * Fallback: <repoRoot>/integrations/rapid-toolkit/.data/rca/  (where the RCA pipeline writes findings)\n   */\n  private getRcaBaseDirs(): string[] {\n    const dirs: string[] = [];\n    const primary = path.join(this.dataDir, 'rca');\n    if (fs.existsSync(primary)) dirs.push(primary);\n\n    // Resolve rapid-toolkit sibling: dataDir is typically .data/ inside OKB,\n    // so ../../rapid-toolkit/.data/rca/ reaches the RCA pipeline output.\n    const toolkitRca = path.resolve(this.dataDir, '..', '..', 'rapid-toolkit', '.data', 'rca');\n    if (fs.existsSync(toolkitRca) && toolkitRca !== primary) dirs.push(toolkitRca);\n\n    return dirs;\n  }\n\n  private listRcaDirs(res: Response): void {\n    try {\n      const rcaBaseDirs = this.getRcaBaseDirs();\n      if (rcaBaseDirs.length === 0) {\n        sendSuccess(res, { dirs: [] });\n        return;\n      }\n      const entries: Array<{ name: string; path: string; pipeline: string; findingCount: number; timestamp: string }> = [];\n      for (const rcaBaseDir of rcaBaseDirs) {\n      for (const d of fs.readdirSync(rcaBaseDir, { withFileTypes: true }).filter(d => d.isDirectory())) {"

{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/Agentic/_work/rapid-automations/integrations/operational-knowledge-management/src/api/routes.ts",
  "old_string": "    } else {\n      // Find most recent matching directory\n      const rcaBaseDir = path.join(this.dataDir, 'rca');\n      if (!fs.existsSync(rcaBaseDir)) {\n        sendError(res, 'No RCA data directory found', 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      const dirs = fs.readdirSync(rcaBaseDir, { withFileTypes: true })\n        .filter(d => d.isDirectory() && (pipelineName === 'e2e' ? d.name.includes('e2e') || d.name.includes('rpr') : d.name.includes(pipelineName)))\n        .sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));\n      if (dirs.length === 0) {\n        sendError(res, `No ${pipelineName} RCA directories found`, 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      rcaDir = path.join(rcaBaseDir, dirs[0].name);\n    }",
  "new_string": "    } else {\n      // Find most recent matching directory across all RCA base dirs\n      const rcaBaseDirs = this.getRcaBaseDirs();\n      if (rcaBaseDirs.length === 0) {\n        sendError(res, 'No RCA data directory found', 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      const allDirs: Array<{ name: string; fullPath: string }> = [];\n      for (const base of rcaBaseDirs) {\n        for (const d of fs.readdirSync(base, { withFileTypes: true })) {\n          if (!d.isDirectory()) continue;\n          const matchesPipeline = pipelineName === 'e2e'\n            ? d.name.includes('e2e') || d.name.includes('rpr')\n            : d.name.includes(pipelineName);\n          if (matchesPipeline) {\n            allDirs.push({ name: d.name, fullPath: path.join(base, d.name) });\n          }\n        }\n      }\n      allDirs.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));\n      if (allDirs.length === 0) {\n        sendError(res, `No ${pipelineName} RCA directories found`, 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      rcaDir = allDirs[0].fullPath;\n    }"
}
```

{
  "command": "python3 -c \"\nimport json\n# Check if ANY entity in raas.json has operational evidence links (argo, s3, cloudwatch, etc.)\nwith open('.data/exports/raas.json') as f:\n    data = json.load(f)\noperational_types = {'argo_workflow', 'argo_logs', 'raas_job', 'cloudwatch', 'grafana', 's3', 'session'}\nfound = []\nfor node in data.get('nodes', []):\n    attrs = node.get('attributes', {})\n    <COMPANY_NAME_REDACTED> = attrs.get('metadata', {})\n    refs = <COMPANY_NAME_REDACTED>.get('sourceRefs', [])\n    for ref in refs:\n        if ref.get('type') in operational_types:\n            found.append((attrs.get('name', '?'), ref['type'], ref['url'][:80]))\nprint(f'Entities with operational links: {len(found)}')\nfor name, typ, url in found[:10]:\n    print(f'  {name}: {typ} -> {url}')\n\"\n",
  "description": "Check if any entity has operational evidence links"
}
```

{
  "command": "python3 -c \"\nimport json\n# Check all sourceRef types across all domains\nfor domain_file in ['.data/exports/raas.json', '.data/exports/kpi-fw.json', '.data/exports/general.json']:\n    try:\n        with open(domain_file) as f:\n            data = json.load(f)\n    except: continue\n    type_counts = {}\n    total_refs = 0\n    for node in data.get('nodes', []):\n        refs = node.get('attributes', {}).get('metadata', {}).get('sourceRefs', [])\n        total_refs += len(refs)\n        for ref in refs:\n            t = ref.get('type', '?')\n            type_counts[t] = type_counts.get(t, 0) + 1\n    print(f'{domain_file}: {total_refs} total refs, types: {type_counts}')\n\"\n",
  "description": "Check sourceRef type distribution across all domains"
}
```

{

  "old_string": "  for (const edge of edges) {\n    let neighborKey: string | null = null;\n    if (edge.source === startKey && entityMap.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighborKey = edge.target;\n    } else if (edge.target === startKey && entityMap.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighborKey = edge.source;\n    }\n    if (!neighborKey) continue;\n\n    const prio = edgePriority(edge.type, isDocMode);\n    const existing = neighborBest.get(neighborKey);\n    if (!existing || prio < existing.priority) {\n      neighborBest.set(neighborKey, { priority: prio, edgeType: edge.type });\n    }\n  }",
  "new_string": "  for (const edge of edges) {\n    // Skip correlation edges — they are statistical co-occurrence, not meaningful\n    // navigational relationships.  Including them inflates the tour from ~14 to 180+.\n    if (edge.type === 'CORRELATED_WITH') continue;\n\n    let neighborKey: string | null = null;\n    if (edge.source === startKey && entityMap.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighborKey = edge.target;\n    } else if (edge.target === startKey && entityMap.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighborKey = edge.source;\n    }\n    if (!neighborKey) continue;\n\n    const prio = edgePriority(edge.type, isDocMode);\n    const existing = neighborBest.get(neighborKey);\n    if (!existing || prio < existing.priority) {\n      neighborBest.set(neighborKey, { priority: prio, edgeType: edge.type });\n    }\n  }"
}
```

### Edit - 2026-04-08 18:46:18 UTC [20:46:18 CEST] (Redirected)

**User Request:** [Image: source: /Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/.claude/image-cache/ed3c7f23-6085-4f41-8e1b-d3b5c82da99c/1.png]

**Tool:** Edit
**Input:** ```json
{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/Agentic/_work/rapid-automations/integrations/operational-knowledge-<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>sal.ts",
  "old_string": "export function getDirectNeighborKeys(\n  entityKey: string,\n  entities: ViewerEntity[],\n  edges: ViewerEdge[],\n): string[] {\n  const entitySet = new Set(entities.map((e) => e.key));\n  const neighbors = new Set<string>();\n  for (const edge of edges) {\n    if (edge.source === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.target);\n    } else if (edge.target === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.source);\n    }\n  }\n  return [...neighbors];\n}",
  "new_string": "export function getDirectNeighborKeys(\n  entityKey: string,\n  entities: ViewerEntity[],\n  edges: ViewerEdge[],\n): string[] {\n  const entitySet = new Set(entities.map((e) => e.key));\n  const neighbors = new Set<string>();\n  for (const edge of edges) {\n    if (edge.type === 'CORRELATED_WITH') continue;\n    if (edge.source === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.target);\n    } else if (edge.target === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.source);\n    }\n  }\n  return [...neighbors];\n}"
}
```

  "new_string": "  /**\n   * Resolve all directories that may contain RCA findings.\n   * Primary: <dataDir>/rca/  (OKB's own data directory)\n   * Fallback: <repoRoot>/integrations/rapid-toolkit/.data/rca/  (where the RCA pipeline writes findings)\n   */\n  private getRcaBaseDirs(): string[] {\n    const dirs: string[] = [];\n    const primary = path.join(this.dataDir, 'rca');\n    if (fs.existsSync(primary)) dirs.push(primary);\n\n    // Resolve rapid-toolkit sibling: dataDir is typically .data/ inside OKB,\n    // so ../../rapid-toolkit/.data/rca/ reaches the RCA pipeline output.\n    const toolkitRca = path.resolve(this.dataDir, '..', '..', 'rapid-toolkit', '.data', 'rca');\n    if (fs.existsSync(toolkitRca) && toolkitRca !== primary) dirs.push(toolkitRca);\n\n    return dirs;\n  }\n\n  private listRcaDirs(res: Response): void {\n    try {\n      const rcaBaseDirs = this.getRcaBaseDirs();\n      if (rcaBaseDirs.length === 0) {\n        sendSuccess(res, { dirs: [] });\n        return;\n      }\n      const entries: Array<{ name: string; path: string; pipeline: string; findingCount: number; timestamp: string }> = [];\n      for (const rcaBaseDir of rcaBaseDirs) {\n      for (const d of fs.readdirSync(rcaBaseDir, { withFileTypes: true }).filter(d => d.isDirectory())) {"
}

### Edit - 2026-04-08 18:46:18 UTC [20:46:18 CEST] (Redirected)

**User Request:** [Image: source: /Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/.claude/image-cache/ed3c7f23-6085-4f41-8e1b-d3b5c82da99c/1.png]

**Input:** ```json
{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/Agentic/_work/rapid-automations/integrations/operational-knowledge-management/src/api/routes.ts",
  "old_string": "    } else {\n      // Find most recent matching directory\n      const rcaBaseDir = path.join(this.dataDir, 'rca');\n      if (!fs.existsSync(rcaBaseDir)) {\n        sendError(res, 'No RCA data directory found', 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      const dirs = fs.readdirSync(rcaBaseDir, { withFileTypes: true })\n        .filter(d => d.isDirectory() && (pipelineName === 'e2e' ? d.name.includes('e2e') || d.name.includes('rpr') : d.name.includes(pipelineName)))\n        .sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));\n      if (dirs.length === 0) {\n        sendError(res, `No ${pipelineName} RCA directories found`, 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      rcaDir = path.join(rcaBaseDir, dirs[0].name);\n    }",
  "new_string": "    } else {\n      // Find most recent matching directory across all RCA base dirs\n      const rcaBaseDirs = this.getRcaBaseDirs();\n      if (rcaBaseDirs.length === 0) {\n        sendError(res, 'No RCA data directory found', 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      const allDirs: Array<{ name: string; fullPath: string }> = [];\n      for (const base of rcaBaseDirs) {\n        for (const d of fs.readdirSync(base, { withFileTypes: true })) {\n          if (!d.isDirectory()) continue;\n          const matchesPipeline = pipelineName === 'e2e'\n            ? d.name.includes('e2e') || d.name.includes('rpr')\n            : d.name.includes(pipelineName);\n          if (matchesPipeline) {\n            allDirs.push({ name: d.name, fullPath: path.join(base, d.name) });\n          }\n        }\n      }\n      allDirs.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));\n      if (allDirs.length === 0) {\n        sendError(res, `No ${pipelineName} RCA directories found`, 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      rcaDir = allDirs[0].fullPath;\n    }"
}

}

**Input:** ```json
{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/Agentic/_work/rapid-automations/integrations/operational-knowledge-<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>sal.ts",
  "old_string": "  for (const edge of edges) {\n    let neighborKey: string | null = null;\n    if (edge.source === startKey && entityMap.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighborKey = edge.target;\n    } else if (edge.target === startKey && entityMap.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighborKey = edge.source;\n    }\n    if (!neighborKey) continue;\n\n    const prio = edgePriority(edge.type, isDocMode);\n    const existing = neighborBest.get(neighborKey);\n    if (!existing || prio < existing.priority) {\n      neighborBest.set(neighborKey, { priority: prio, edgeType: edge.type });\n    }\n  }",
  "new_string": "  for (const edge of edges) {\n    // Skip correlation edges — they are statistical co-occurrence, not meaningful\n    // navigational relationships.  Including them inflates the tour from ~14 to 180+.\n    if (edge.type === 'CORRELATED_WITH') continue;\n\n    let neighborKey: string | null = null;\n    if (edge.source === startKey && entityMap.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighborKey = edge.target;\n    } else if (edge.target === startKey && entityMap.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighborKey = edge.source;\n    }\n    if (!neighborKey) continue;\n\n    const prio = edgePriority(edge.type, isDocMode);\n    const existing = neighborBest.get(neighborKey);\n    if (!existing || prio < existing.priority) {\n      neighborBest.set(neighborKey, { priority: prio, edgeType: edge.type });\n    }\n  }"
}
```

### Edit - 2026-04-08 18:46:18 UTC [20:46:18 CEST] (Redirected)

**User Request:** [Image: source: /Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/.claude/image-cache/ed3c7f23-6085-4f41-8e1b-d3b5c82da99c/1.png]

**Tool:** Edit
**Input:** ```json
{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/Agentic/_work/rapid-automations/integrations/operational-knowledge-<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>sal.ts",
  "old_string": "export function getDirectNeighborKeys(\n  entityKey: string,\n  entities: ViewerEntity[],\n  edges: ViewerEdge[],\n): string[] {\n  const entitySet = new Set(entities.map((e) => e.key));\n  const neighbors = new Set<string>();\n  for (const edge of edges) {\n    if (edge.source === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.target);\n    } else if (edge.target === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.source);\n    }\n  }\n  return [...neighbors];\n}",
  "new_string": "export function getDirectNeighborKeys(\n  entityKey: string,\n  entities: ViewerEntity[],\n  edges: ViewerEdge[],\n): string[] {\n  const entitySet = new Set(entities.map((e) => e.key));\n  const neighbors = new Set<string>();\n  for (const edge of edges) {\n    if (edge.type === 'CORRELATED_WITH') continue;\n    if (edge.source === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.target);\n    } else if (edge.target === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.source);\n    }\n  }\n  return [...neighbors];\n}"
}
```

'kpifw' : d.name.includes('raas') ? 'raas' : (hasRaas ? 'raas' : hasKpifw ? 'kpifw' : 'unknown');\n          const findingCount = raasFiles.length + kpifwFiles.length;\n          if (findingCount > 0) {\n            entries.push({ name: d.name, path: fullPath, pipeline, findingCount, timestamp });\n          }\n        }\n      }\n      entries.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));\n      sendSuccess(res, { dirs: entries });",
  "new_string": "      for (const rcaBaseDir of rcaBaseDirs) {\n        for (const d of fs.readdirSync(rcaBaseDir, { withFileTypes: true }).filter(d => d.isDirectory())) {\n          const fullPath = path.join(rcaBaseDir, d.name);\n          const raasFiles = fs.readdirSync(fullPath).filter(f => f.match(/^raas-rca-cluster-\\d+\\.json$/));\n          const kpifwFiles = fs.readdirSync(fullPath).filter(f => f.match(/^kpifw-rca-group-\\d+\\.json$/));\n          const timestamp = d.name.split('_')[0] || '';\n          const hasRaas = raasFiles.length > 0;\n          const hasKpifw = kpifwFiles.length > 0;\n\n          if (hasRaas && hasKpifw) {\n            entries.push({ name: d.name, path: fullPath, pipeline: 'raas', findingCount: raasFiles.length, timestamp });\n            entries.push({ name: d.name, path: fullPath, pipeline: 'kpifw', findingCount: kpifwFiles.length, timestamp });\n          } else {\n            const pipeline = d.name.includes('kpifw') ? {
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/Agentic/_work/rapid-automations/integrations/operational-knowledge-management/src/api/routes.ts",
  "old_string": "    } else {\n      // Find most recent matching directory\n      const rcaBaseDir = path.join(this.dataDir, 'rca');\n      if (!fs.existsSync(rcaBaseDir)) {\n        sendError(res, 'No RCA data directory found', 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      const dirs = fs.readdirSync(rcaBaseDir, { withFileTypes: true })\n        .filter(d => d.isDirectory() && (pipelineName === 'e2e' ? d.name.includes('e2e') || d.name.includes('rpr') : d.name.includes(pipelineName)))\n        .sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));\n      if (dirs.length === 0) {\n        sendError(res, `No ${pipelineName} RCA directories found`, 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      rcaDir = path.join(rcaBaseDir, dirs[0].name);\n    }",
  "new_string": "    } else {\n      // Find most recent matching directory across all RCA base dirs\n      const rcaBaseDirs = this.getRcaBaseDirs();\n      if (rcaBaseDirs.length === 0) {\n        sendError(res, 'No RCA data directory found', 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      const allDirs: Array<{ name: string; fullPath: string }> = [];\n      for (const base of rcaBaseDirs) {\n        for (const d of fs.readdirSync(base, { withFileTypes: true })) {\n          if (!d.isDirectory()) continue;\n          const matchesPipeline = pipelineName === 'e2e'\n            ? d.name.includes('e2e') || d.name.includes('rpr')\n            : d.name.includes(pipelineName);\n          if (matchesPipeline) {\n            allDirs.push({ name: d.name, fullPath: path.join(base, d.name) });\n          }\n        }\n      }\n      allDirs.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));\n      if (allDirs.length === 0) {\n        sendError(res, `No ${pipelineName} RCA directories found`, 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      rcaDir = allDirs[0].fullPath;\n    }"
}

  "new_string": "  const dirIdx = args.indexOf('--dir');\n  let findingDir: string;\n  if (dirIdx !== -1 && args[dirIdx + 1]) {\n    findingDir = args[dirIdx + 1];\n  } else {\n    // Auto-discover: find most recent RCA run in rapid-toolkit\n    const toolkitRca = path.resolve(__dirname, '..', '..', 'rapid-toolkit', '.data', 'rca');\n    if (fs.existsSync(toolkitRca)) {\n      const subdirs = fs.readdirSync(toolkitRca, { withFileTypes: true })\n        .filter(d => d.isDirectory())\n        .sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));\n      if (subdirs.length > 0) {\n        findingDir = path.join(toolkitRca, subdirs[0].name);\n        process.stderr.write(`Auto-discovered RCA dir: ${findingDir}\\n`);\n      } else {\n        console.error('No RCA run directories found in rapid-toolkit');\n        process.exit(1);\n      }\n    } else {\n      console.error(`RCA data not found at ${toolkitRca}. Use --dir to specify.`);\n      process.exit(1);\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Discover finding files\n  const raasFiles = fs.readdirSync(findingDir)"
}

  "description": "Verify server RCA directory discovery"
}

}

{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/Agentic/_work/rapid-automations/integrations/operational-knowledge-<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>sal.ts",
  "old_string": "  for (const edge of edges) {\n    let neighborKey: string | null = null;\n    if (edge.source === startKey && entityMap.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighborKey = edge.target;\n    } else if (edge.target === startKey && entityMap.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighborKey = edge.source;\n    }\n    if (!neighborKey) continue;\n\n    const prio = edgePriority(edge.type, isDocMode);\n    const existing = neighborBest.get(neighborKey);\n    if (!existing || prio < existing.priority) {\n      neighborBest.set(neighborKey, { priority: prio, edgeType: edge.type });\n    }\n  }",
  "new_string": "  for (const edge of edges) {\n    // Skip correlation edges — they are statistical co-occurrence, not meaningful\n    // navigational relationships.  Including them inflates the tour from ~14 to 180+.\n    if (edge.type === 'CORRELATED_WITH') continue;\n\n    let neighborKey: string | null = null;\n    if (edge.source === startKey && entityMap.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighborKey = edge.target;\n    } else if (edge.target === startKey && entityMap.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighborKey = edge.source;\n    }\n    if (!neighborKey) continue;\n\n    const prio = edgePriority(edge.type, isDocMode);\n    const existing = neighborBest.get(neighborKey);\n    if (!existing || prio < existing.priority) {\n      neighborBest.set(neighborKey, { priority: prio, edgeType: edge.type });\n    }\n  }"
}
```

**User Request:** [Image: source: /Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/.claude/image-cache/ed3c7f23-6085-4f41-8e1b-d3b5c82da99c/1.png]

**Tool:** Edit
**Input:** ```json
{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/Agentic/_work/rapid-automations/integrations/operational-knowledge-<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>sal.ts",
  "old_string": "export function getDirectNeighborKeys(\n  entityKey: string,\n  entities: ViewerEntity[],\n  edges: ViewerEdge[],\n): string[] {\n  const entitySet = new Set(entities.map((e) => e.key));\n  const neighbors = new Set<string>();\n  for (const edge of edges) {\n    if (edge.source === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.target);\n    } else if (edge.target === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.source);\n    }\n  }\n  return [...neighbors];\n}",
  "new_string": "export function getDirectNeighborKeys(\n  entityKey: string,\n  entities: ViewerEntity[],\n  edges: ViewerEdge[],\n): string[] {\n  const entitySet = new Set(entities.map((e) => e.key));\n  const neighbors = new Set<string>();\n  for (const edge of edges) {\n    if (edge.type === 'CORRELATED_WITH') continue;\n    if (edge.source === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.target);\n    } else if (edge.target === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.source);\n    }\n  }\n  return [...neighbors];\n}"
}
```

  "new_string": "  /**\n   * Resolve all directories that may contain RCA findings.\n   * Primary: <dataDir>/rca/  (OKB's own data directory)\n   * Fallback: <repoRoot>/integrations/rapid-toolkit/.data/rca/  (where the RCA pipeline writes findings)\n   */\n  private getRcaBaseDirs(): string[] {\n    const dirs: string[] = [];\n    const primary = path.join(this.dataDir, 'rca');\n    if (fs.existsSync(primary)) dirs.push(primary);\n\n    // Resolve rapid-toolkit sibling: dataDir is typically .data/ inside OKB,\n    // so ../../rapid-toolkit/.data/rca/ reaches the RCA pipeline output.\n    const toolkitRca = path.resolve(this.dataDir, '..', '..', 'rapid-toolkit', '.data', 'rca');\n    if (fs.existsSync(toolkitRca) && toolkitRca !== primary) dirs.push(toolkitRca);\n\n    return dirs;\n  }\n\n  private listRcaDirs(res: Response): void {\n    try {\n      const rcaBaseDirs = this.getRcaBaseDirs();\n      if (rcaBaseDirs.length === 0) {\n        sendSuccess(res, { dirs: [] });\n        return;\n      }\n      const entries: Array<{ name: string; path: string; pipeline: string; findingCount: number; timestamp: string }> = [];\n      for (const rcaBaseDir of rcaBaseDirs) {\n      for (const d of fs.readdirSync(rcaBaseDir, { withFileTypes: true }).filter(d => d.isDirectory())) {"

'kpifw' : d.name.includes('raas') ? 'raas' : (hasRaas ? 'raas' : hasKpifw ? 'kpifw' : 'unknown');\n          const findingCount = raasFiles.length + kpifwFiles.length;\n          if (findingCount > 0) {\n            entries.push({ name: d.name, path: fullPath, pipeline, findingCount, timestamp });\n          }\n        }\n      }\n      entries.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));\n      sendSuccess(res, { dirs: entries });",
  "new_string": "      for (const rcaBaseDir of rcaBaseDirs) {\n        for (const d of fs.readdirSync(rcaBaseDir, { withFileTypes: true }).filter(d => d.isDirectory())) {\n          const fullPath = path.join(rcaBaseDir, d.name);\n          const raasFiles = fs.readdirSync(fullPath).filter(f => f.match(/^raas-rca-cluster-\\d+\\.json$/));\n          const kpifwFiles = fs.readdirSync(fullPath).filter(f => f.match(/^kpifw-rca-group-\\d+\\.json$/));\n          const timestamp = d.name.split('_')[0] || '';\n          const hasRaas = raasFiles.length > 0;\n          const hasKpifw = kpifwFiles.length > 0;\n\n          if (hasRaas && hasKpifw) {\n            entries.push({ name: d.name, path: fullPath, pipeline: 'raas', findingCount: raasFiles.length, timestamp });\n            entries.push({ name: d.name, path: fullPath, pipeline: 'kpifw', findingCount: kpifwFiles.length, timestamp });\n          } else {\n            const pipeline = d.name.includes('kpifw') ? **Input:** ```json
{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/Agentic/_work/rapid-automations/integrations/operational-knowledge-management/src/api/routes.ts",
  "old_string": "    } else {\n      // Find most recent matching directory\n      const rcaBaseDir = path.join(this.dataDir, 'rca');\n      if (!fs.existsSync(rcaBaseDir)) {\n        sendError(res, 'No RCA data directory found', 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      const dirs = fs.readdirSync(rcaBaseDir, { withFileTypes: true })\n        .filter(d => d.isDirectory() && (pipelineName === 'e2e' ? d.name.includes('e2e') || d.name.includes('rpr') : d.name.includes(pipelineName)))\n        .sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));\n      if (dirs.length === 0) {\n        sendError(res, `No ${pipelineName} RCA directories found`, 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      rcaDir = path.join(rcaBaseDir, dirs[0].name);\n    }",
  "new_string": "    } else {\n      // Find most recent matching directory across all RCA base dirs\n      const rcaBaseDirs = this.getRcaBaseDirs();\n      if (rcaBaseDirs.length === 0) {\n        sendError(res, 'No RCA data directory found', 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      const allDirs: Array<{ name: string; fullPath: string }> = [];\n      for (const base of rcaBaseDirs) {\n        for (const d of fs.readdirSync(base, { withFileTypes: true })) {\n          if (!d.isDirectory()) continue;\n          const matchesPipeline = pipelineName === 'e2e'\n            ? d.name.includes('e2e') || d.name.includes('rpr')\n            : d.name.includes(pipelineName);\n          if (matchesPipeline) {\n            allDirs.push({ name: d.name, fullPath: path.join(base, d.name) });\n          }\n        }\n      }\n      allDirs.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));\n      if (allDirs.length === 0) {\n        sendError(res, `No ${pipelineName} RCA directories found`, 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      rcaDir = allDirs[0].fullPath;\n    }"
}

{
  "command": "node -e \"\nconst fs = require('fs');\nconst path = require('path');\nconst dataDir = '.data';\nconst dirs = [];\nconst primary = path.join(dataDir, 'rca');\nif (fs.existsSync(primary)) dirs.push(primary);\nconst toolkitRca = path.resolve(dataDir, '..', '..', 'rapid-toolkit', '.data', 'rca');\nif (fs.existsSync(toolkitRca)) dirs.push(toolkitRca);\nconsole.log('RCA base dirs:', dirs);\nfor (const base of dirs) {\n  const subdirs = fs.readdirSync(base, { withFileTypes: true }).filter(d => d.isDirectory());\n  for (const d of subdirs) {\n    const full = path.join(base, d.name);\n    const files = fs.readdirSync(full);\n    const raas = files.filter(f => /^raas-rca-cluster-\\d+\\.json$/.test(f)).length;\n    const kpifw = files.filter(f => /^kpifw-rca-group-\\d+\\.json$/.test(f)).length;\n    console.log('  ', d.name, '-> raas:', raas, 'kpifw:', kpifw);\n  }\n}\n\"\n",
  "description": "Verify server RCA directory discovery"
}
```

### Bash - 2026-04-08 18:44:30 UTC [20:44:30 CEST] (Redirected)

**User Request:** # Session Logs (/sl) - Session Continuity Command

Load and summarize recent Live Session Logs (LSL) to provide continuity from previous work sessions.

## Instructions

**Goal**: Load recent LSL files and produce a summary to establish context continuity.

### Step 1: Determine Current Project

1. Get the current working directory
2. Identify the project name (the directory name containing `.specstory/history`)
3. Note if this IS the `coding` project or a DIFFERENT project

### Step 2: Load LSL Files from Current Project

1. List files in `.specstory/history/` sorted by modification time (most recent first)
2. Load the **most recent** LSL file
3. Check file size/content length:
   - If file is **short** (less than 50KB or fewer than 500 lines of actual content), also load 1-2 previous files
   - "Short" means the session was brief and may not have enough context
4. Note the **timestamp range** from the oldest loaded file's filename (format: `YYYY-MM-DD_HHMM`)

### Step 3: Load Coding Project LSL Files (Cross-Project Context)

**Only if current project is NOT `coding`:**

1. Check `/Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/Agentic/coding/.specstory/history/` for LSL files
2. Find files that fall within or overlap the timestamp range from Step 2
3. Load the most recent coding LSL file from that time range
4. If that file is short, also load 1-2 previous files from coding

**If current project IS `coding`:** Skip this step (already handled in Step 2)

### Step 4: Produce Summary

Create a concise summary covering:

1. **Time Range**: When these sessions occurred
2. **Projects Involved**: Which projects had activity
3. **Key Topics/Tasks**: Main things worked on in each session
4. **Current State**: What was left in progress or recently completed
5. **Suggested Next Steps**: Any obvious continuity items

Format the summary as:

```
## Session Continuity Summary

**Time Range**: [oldest file date] to [newest file date]
**Projects**: [list of projects with activity]

### Recent Work:
- [Project A]: [Brief description of main tasks]
- [Project B]: [Brief description of main tasks]

### Current State:
[What was in progress or just completed]

### Suggested Continuity:
[Any obvious next steps or items to pick up]
```

## File Selection Logic

- **Primary criterion**: Recency (most recent first)
- **Secondary criterion**: Length (short files trigger loading more files)
- **Tertiary criterion**: Cross-project relevance (coding project files during same timeframe)

## Size Thresholds

- **Short file**: < 50KB or < 500 lines → load additional files
- **Medium file**: 50KB-200KB → sufficient context alone
- **Large file**: > 200KB → definitely sufficient, may want to focus on recent sections

## Path Constants

- Current project LSL: `.specstory/history/`
- Coding project LSL: `/Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/Agentic/coding/.specstory/history/`

## User Arguments

If user provides ``:
- Number (e.g., "3"): Load exactly that many recent files per project
- "all": Load all files from today
- Empty/default: Use automatic length-based detection

---

**Begin by identifying the current project and loading the most recent LSL file.**

**Tool:** Bash
**Input:** ```json
{
  "command": "ls -lt /Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/Agentic/_work/rapid-automations/.specstory/history/ | head -10",
  "description": "List recent LSL files sorted by time"
}
```

**Result:** ✅ Success
**Output:** ```

-rw-r--r-- 1 <USER_ID_REDACTED> staff  106529 Apr  8 20:44 2026-04-08_2000-2100_c197ef.md
-rw-r--r-- 1 <USER_ID_REDACTED> staff  566899 Apr  8 19:57 2026-04-08_1900-2000_c197ef.md
-rw-r--r-- 1 <USER_ID_REDACTED> staff  205501 Apr  8 19:17 2026-04-08_1800-1900_c197ef.md
-rw-r--r-- 1 <USER_ID_REDACTED> staff 1712774 Apr  8 18:11 2026-04-08_1600-1700_c197ef.md
-rw-r--r-- 1 <USER_ID_REDACTED> staff 2164856 Apr  8 18:03 2026-04-08_1700-1800_c197ef.md
-rw-r--r-- 1 <USER_ID_REDACTED> staff    3925 Apr  8 14:54 2026-04-08_1400-1500_c197ef.md
-rw-r--r-- 1 Q

Load and summarize recent Live Session Logs (LSL) to provide continuity from previous work sessions.

2. Identify the project name (the directory name containing `.specstory/history`)
3. Note if this IS the `coding` project or a DIFFERENT project

1. List files in `.specstory/history/` sorted by modification time (most recent first)
2. Load the **most recent** LSL file
3. Check file size/content length:
   - If file is **short** (less than 50KB or fewer than 500 lines of actual content), also load 1-2 previous files
   - "Short" means the session was brief and may not have enough context

}

{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/Agentic/_work/rapid-automations/integrations/operational-knowledge-<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>sal.ts",
  "old_string": "  for (const edge of edges) {\n    let neighborKey: string | null = null;\n    if (edge.source === startKey && entityMap.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighborKey = edge.target;\n    } else if (edge.target === startKey && entityMap.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighborKey = edge.source;\n    }\n    if (!neighborKey) continue;\n\n    const prio = edgePriority(edge.type, isDocMode);\n    const existing = neighborBest.get(neighborKey);\n    if (!existing || prio < existing.priority) {\n      neighborBest.set(neighborKey, { priority: prio, edgeType: edge.type });\n    }\n  }",
  "new_string": "  for (const edge of edges) {\n    // Skip correlation edges — they are statistical co-occurrence, not meaningful\n    // navigational relationships.  Including them inflates the tour from ~14 to 180+.\n    if (edge.type === 'CORRELATED_WITH') continue;\n\n    let neighborKey: string | null = null;\n    if (edge.source === startKey && entityMap.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighborKey = edge.target;\n    } else if (edge.target === startKey && entityMap.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighborKey = edge.source;\n    }\n    if (!neighborKey) continue;\n\n    const prio = edgePriority(edge.type, isDocMode);\n    const existing = neighborBest.get(neighborKey);\n    if (!existing || prio < existing.priority) {\n      neighborBest.set(neighborKey, { priority: prio, edgeType: edge.type });\n    }\n  }"
}
```

**User Request:** [Image: source: /Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/.claude/image-cache/ed3c7f23-6085-4f41-8e1b-d3b5c82da99c/1.png]

**Tool:** Edit
**Input:** ```json
{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/Agentic/_work/rapid-automations/integrations/operational-knowledge-<AWS_SECRET_REDACTED>sal.ts",
  "old_string": "export function getDirectNeighborKeys(\n  entityKey: string,\n  entities: ViewerEntity[],\n  edges: ViewerEdge[],\n): string[] {\n  const entitySet = new Set(entities.map((e) => e.key));\n  const neighbors = new Set<string>();\n  for (const edge of edges) {\n    if (edge.source === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.target);\n    } else if (edge.target === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.source);\n    }\n  }\n  return [...neighbors];\n}",
  "new_string": "export function getDirectNeighborKeys(\n  entityKey: string,\n  entities: ViewerEntity[],\n  edges: ViewerEdge[],\n): string[] {\n  const entitySet = new Set(entities.map((e) => e.key));\n  const neighbors = new Set<string>();\n  for (const edge of edges) {\n    if (edge.type === 'CORRELATED_WITH') continue;\n    if (edge.source === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.target)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.target);\n    } else if (edge.target === entityKey && entitySet.has(edge.source)) {\n      neighbors.add(edge.source);\n    }\n  }\n  return [...neighbors];\n}"
}
```

  "new_string": "  /**\n   * Resolve all directories that may contain RCA findings.\n   * Primary: <dataDir>/rca/  (OKB's own data directory)\n   * Fallback: <repoRoot>/integrations/rapid-toolkit/.data/rca/  (where the RCA pipeline writes findings)\n   */\n  private getRcaBaseDirs(): string[] {\n    const dirs: string[] = [];\n    const primary = path.join(this.dataDir, 'rca');\n    if (fs.existsSync(primary)) dirs.push(primary);\n\n    // Resolve rapid-toolkit sibling: dataDir is typically .data/ inside OKB,\n    // so ../../rapid-toolkit/.data/rca/ reaches the RCA pipeline output.\n    const toolkitRca = path.resolve(this.dataDir, '..', '..', 'rapid-toolkit', '.data', 'rca');\n    if (fs.existsSync(toolkitRca) && toolkitRca !== primary) dirs.push(toolkitRca);\n\n    return dirs;\n  }\n\n  private listRcaDirs(res: Response): void {\n    try {\n      const rcaBaseDirs = this.getRcaBaseDirs();\n      if (rcaBaseDirs.length === 0) {\n        sendSuccess(res, { dirs: [] });\n        return;\n      }\n      const entries: Array<{ name: string; path: string; pipeline: string; findingCount: number; timestamp: string }> = [];\n      for (const rcaBaseDir of rcaBaseDirs) {\n      for (const d of fs.readdirSync(rcaBaseDir, { withFileTypes: true }).filter(d => d.isDirectory())) {"

'kpifw' : d.name.includes('raas') ? 'raas' : (hasRaas ? 'raas' : hasKpifw ? 'kpifw' : 'unknown');\n          const findingCount = raasFiles.length + kpifwFiles.length;\n          if (findingCount > 0) {\n            entries.push({ name: d.name, path: fullPath, pipeline, findingCount, timestamp });\n          }\n        }\n      }\n      entries.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));\n      sendSuccess(res, { dirs: entries });",
  "new_string": "      for (const rcaBaseDir of rcaBaseDirs) {\n        for (const d of fs.readdirSync(rcaBaseDir, { withFileTypes: true }).filter(d => d.isDirectory())) {\n          const fullPath = path.join(rcaBaseDir, d.name);\n          const raasFiles = fs.readdirSync(fullPath).filter(f => f.match(/^raas-rca-cluster-\\d+\\.json$/));\n          const kpifwFiles = fs.readdirSync(fullPath).filter(f => f.match(/^kpifw-rca-group-\\d+\\.json$/));\n          const timestamp = d.name.split('_')[0] || '';\n          const hasRaas = raasFiles.length > 0;\n          const hasKpifw = kpifwFiles.length > 0;\n\n          if (hasRaas && hasKpifw) {\n            entries.push({ name: d.name, path: fullPath, pipeline: 'raas', findingCount: raasFiles.length, timestamp });\n            entries.push({ name: d.name, path: fullPath, pipeline: 'kpifw', findingCount: kpifwFiles.length, timestamp });\n          } else {\n            const pipeline = d.name.includes('kpifw') ? **Input:** ```json
{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "/Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/Agentic/_work/rapid-automations/integrations/operational-knowledge-management/src/api/routes.ts",
  "old_string": "    } else {\n      // Find most recent matching directory\n      const rcaBaseDir = path.join(this.dataDir, 'rca');\n      if (!fs.existsSync(rcaBaseDir)) {\n        sendError(res, 'No RCA data directory found', 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      const dirs = fs.readdirSync(rcaBaseDir, { withFileTypes: true })\n        .filter(d => d.isDirectory() && (pipelineName === 'e2e' ? d.name.includes('e2e') || d.name.includes('rpr') : d.name.includes(pipelineName)))\n        .sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));\n      if (dirs.length === 0) {\n        sendError(res, `No ${pipelineName} RCA directories found`, 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      rcaDir = path.join(rcaBaseDir, dirs[0].name);\n    }",
  "new_string": "    } else {\n      // Find most recent matching directory across all RCA base dirs\n      const rcaBaseDirs = this.getRcaBaseDirs();\n      if (rcaBaseDirs.length === 0) {\n        sendError(res, 'No RCA data directory found', 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      const allDirs: Array<{ name: string; fullPath: string }> = [];\n      for (const base of rcaBaseDirs) {\n        for (const d of fs.readdirSync(base, { withFileTypes: true })) {\n          if (!d.isDirectory()) continue;\n          const matchesPipeline = pipelineName === 'e2e'\n            ? d.name.includes('e2e') || d.name.includes('rpr')\n            : d.name.includes(pipelineName);\n          if (matchesPipeline) {\n            allDirs.push({ name: d.name, fullPath: path.join(base, d.name) });\n          }\n        }\n      }\n      allDirs.sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));\n      if (allDirs.length === 0) {\n        sendError(res, `No ${pipelineName} RCA directories found`, 404);\n        return;\n      }\n      rcaDir = allDirs[0].fullPath;\n    }"
}

  "new_string": "  const dirIdx = args.indexOf('--dir');\n  let findingDir: string;\n  if (dirIdx !== -1 && args[dirIdx + 1]) {\n    findingDir = args[dirIdx + 1];\n  } else {\n    // Auto-discover: find most recent RCA run in rapid-toolkit\n    const toolkitRca = path.resolve(__dirname, '..', '..', 'rapid-toolkit', '.data', 'rca');\n    if (fs.existsSync(toolkitRca)) {\n      const subdirs = fs.readdirSync(toolkitRca, { withFileTypes: true })\n        .filter(d => d.isDirectory())\n        .sort((a, b) => b.name.localeCompare(a.name));\n      if (subdirs.length > 0) {\n        findingDir = path.join(toolkitRca, subdirs[0].name);\n        process.stderr.write(`Auto-discovered RCA dir: ${findingDir}\\n`);\n      } else {\n        console.error('No RCA run directories found in rapid-toolkit');\n        process.exit(1);\n      }\n    } else {\n      console.error(`RCA data not found at ${toolkitRca}. Use --dir to specify.`);\n      process.exit(1);\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Discover finding files\n  const raasFiles = fs.readdirSync(findingDir)"
}

**User Request:** [Image: source: /Users/<USER_ID_REDACTED>/.claude/image-cache/ed3c7f23-6085-4f41-8e1b-d3b5c82da99c/1.png]

**Tool:** Bash

{
  "command": "node -e \"\nconst fs = require('fs');\nconst path = require('path');\nconst dataDir = '.data';\nconst dirs = [];\nconst primary = path.join(dataDir, 'rca');\nif (fs.existsSync(primary)) dirs.push(primary);\nconst toolkitRca = path.resolve(dataDir, '..', '..', 'rapid-toolkit', '.data', 'rca');\nif (fs.existsSync(toolkitRca)) dirs.push(toolkitRca);\nconsole.log('RCA base dirs:', dirs);\nfor (const base of dirs) {\n  const subdirs = fs.readdirSync(base, { withFileTypes: true }).filter(d => d.isDirectory());\n  for (const d of subdirs) {\n    const full = path.join(base, d.name);\n    const files = fs.readdirSync(full);\n    const raas = files.filter(f => /^raas-rca-cluster-\\d+\\.json$/.test(f)).length;\n    const kpifw = files.filter(f => /^kpifw-rca-group-\\d+\\.json$/.test(f)).length;\n    console.log('  ', d.name, '-> raas:', raas, 'kpifw:', kpifw);\n  }\n}\n\"\n",
  "description": "Verify server RCA directory discovery"
}
```
